race.comment: ZOUFANI (9) made it nine top-three finishes from ten career runs when a game second over this distance at Eagle Farm in heavy going last start. Drops back from Saturday metro company and only carries 2kgs more. Finding it hard to break through but this presents a perfect chance. DAMEHOOD (13) has transferred from Ciaron Maher to Chris Anderson and is back from an 11-week lay-off. Good fresh performer who has run some nice races against better opposition than this. Not far away in a recent trial and looks ready to make a positive first impression. REGAL STATUE (12) is back after a 160-day absence and joins the Kelly Schweida stable after starting life in WA. Beaten just 3 lengths when fresh from a spell in Listed company last prep. Betting a key indicator. ISTI STAR (6) tired late in a Listed race at Eagle Farm last time but can bounce back. BLUEPINOT (5) resumes. Will be better for the run but cannot be left out of exotic plays.
